programme.title: The Batman
programme.desc: Batman ventures into Gotham City's underworld when a sadistic killer leaves behind a trail of cryptic clues. As the scale of the perpetrator's plans become clear, he must bring justice to the abuse of power and corruption that plagues the metropolis.

programme.desc: Wanda, Lacey, and Karen team up to fix The Ruby's broken toaster; Emma and Oscar have an impression-off; Davis is excited when he discovers Hank owns a valuable action figure.

programme.desc: Hobo reveals an ambitious imposter to a small religious community.

programme.title: The Littlest Hobo
programme.desc: Hobo helps a go-cart driver who is trying a earn a position on the national racing team.

programme.title: Comfort Food With Spencer Watts
programme.desc: Spencer and the crew meet bad weather, but it doesn't stop them; apple cereal dusted popovers; a skillet sweet potato and sausage egg bake; a croissant, bacon bread pudding and eggs Benedict.

programme.title: Mary Makes It Easy
programme.desc: Unlock the potential of the indispensable, but intimidating, cast iron pan with versatile recipes and tips to keep it pristine.

programme.title: The Perspective With Mike Sherbino
programme.desc: Mike Sherbino has in-depth conversations with guests on social, ethical and spiritual issues from a Christian perspective.

programme.title: Cash Cab
programme.desc: Unsuspecting members of the public climbing into an apparently normal taxicab, only to find themselves on national television, with a chance to win a small fortune; hosted by Adam Growe.

programme.title: Question Period
programme.desc: Discussions with key players in Canadian politics.

programme.title: Heavy Rescue: 401
programme.desc: When Sonny needs to pull off an urgent recovery, he turns to an unexpected source for help; a tight recovery puts Duncan right up against a live lane of traffic; Gary's crew takes on the last big rollover of the winter.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Harry Potter and the Deathly Hallows: Part 2
programme.desc: A clash between good and evil awaits as young Harry, Ron and Hermione prepare for a final battle against Lord Voldemort. Harry has grown into a steely lad on a mission to rid the world of evil. The friends must search for the Horcruxes that keep the dastardly wizard immortal. Harry and Voldemort meet at Hogwarts Castle for a showdown where the forces of darkness may finally meet their match.

programme.title: Live with Kelly and Mark

programme.title: Live: The Good Stuff With Mary Berg
programme.desc: Iced coffee three ways; grocery store flowers glow-up; Colin and Justin on moving from the big city to a small town; Canadian Asian fashion brands.

programme.title: The View
programme.desc: Created in 1997 by veteran journalist Barbara Walters, "The View" is a daytime talk show hosted by women -- including Whoopi Goldberg, Joy Behar, Sunny Hostin, Sara Haines, Alyssa Farah Griffin and Ana Navarro -- and each offers her take on the day's news during the opening "Hot Topics" segment. Later, the ladies welcome various celebrities, who join them in a chat or perform for the audience. The program also offers tips on beauty, fashion, diet and relationships. Known for their freewheeling style, the hosts are often lampooned in late-night sketches.

programme.desc: Jackie prepares for a series of physical tests in an effort to rejoin the police force; Darlene confronts the insecurities in her marriage with Ben; Dan's deposition stirs up feelings; final farewells are made in true Conner family fashion.

programme.title: The Conners
programme.desc: In the wake of Emilio's deportation, Jackie steps into the role of a paternal figure and creates a meticulous birth plan for Becky; Darlene is tangled in a complex love triangle with David and Ben; Harris is caught up in a problem of her own.
